Tutorial.name: Welcome!
Tutorial.description: Welcome to your town, Mayor! I'm the Professor! To succeed, grow your small village into a bustling city and amass a fortune! Tap to continue.

Tutorial.name: Build a Cottage!
Tutorial.description: First things first - attract a villager by building a cottage! Tap the glowing hammer on the bottom right of the screen and select the Small Cottage.

Lock.message: Locked! Try building a Small Cottage first.

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Small Cottage to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Cottage Built!
Tutorial.description: Good job, your first cottage is now built and your first villager has moved in! Each cottage creates one villager! Tap to continue.

Tutorial.name: Logging Camp
Tutorial.description: Let's build a Logging Camp for a place to do work. Logging Camps make wood! Tap the hammer in the bottom right and select the Logging Camp.

Lock.message: Locked! Try building a Logging Camp first.

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Logging Camp to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Make a Wood Cutter
Tutorial.description: Your Logging Camp is built! Now put a villager to work. Tap the villager and pick 'Give Job,' then tap the Logging Camp and pick 'Wood Cutter.'

Lock.message: Locked! Assign a Worker to your Logging Camp.

Tutorial.name: Wood Cutter!
Tutorial.description: Well done! Your villager has started their new job as a Wood Cutter. Villagers will keep working for you, even while you're not playing!

Tutorial.name: Hurrying!
Tutorial.description: Your town needs lots of wood to grow. Don't wait for it! Make villagers harvest wood instantly - tap the Logging Camp and select Hurry. Try it now!

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for the hurry to complete.

Tutorial.name: Magic Beans!
Tutorial.description: You just got a pile of wood! Hurrying uses Magic Beans. To get more Magic Beans, tap 'Get More!' at the bottom left of the screen!

Tutorial.name: Build a Stockpile
Tutorial.description: You need somewhere to store your wood, so let's build a stockpile. Tap the hammer and select 'Stockpile.'

Lock.message: Locked! Proceed by building a Stockpile.

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Stockpile to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Stockpiles
Tutorial.description: You can store resources in stockpiles until you're ready to use or sell them. Tap your stockpile anytime to see what it holds.

Tutorial.name: Collect Wood
Tutorial.description: Let's collect the wood from your Logging Camp to add to your Stockpile. Tap your Logging Camp then tap 'Collect.'

Tutorial.name: Collect Resources
Tutorial.description: Buildings can only hold 150 resources at a time, so collect them regularly or your workers will stop working until you do.

Tutorial.name: Build a Farm
Tutorial.description: Your town is out of wheat! Farms produce wheat, so let's build one. Tap the hammer icon and select 'Farm.'

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Farm to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Farm Built!
Tutorial.description: Your farm is built, now let's put it to work! We don't have another villager to work at the farm, so build a cottage to get another villager.

Tutorial.name: Second Cottage
Tutorial.description: Build another cottage to get your second villager. If you need more wood, Hurry your logging camp and collect the wood!

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Small Cottage to finish building.
Locked! You have enough Wood. Collect it and build a Small Cottage.

Tutorial.name: Farmer
Tutorial.description: Good job, your second villager is ready to become a Farmer! Tap the villager and pick 'Give Job,' then tap the Farm and pick 'Farmer.'

Lock.message: Locked! Your farm needs a farmer.

Tutorial.name: More Villagers!
Tutorial.description: Your town is progressing, but your villagers are lonely! Build another cottage. Hurry your logging camp and farm to get the supplies you need!

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your Small Cottage to finish building.
Locked! You've gathered enough Wood. When you have enough Wheat, build a Small Cottage.
Locked! You've gathered enough Wheat When you have enough Wood, build a Small Cottage.

Tutorial.name: Haulers
Tutorial.description: Great job! Now let's automate our village with a Hauler. Haulers are villagers that collect resources for you.

Tutorial.name: Wood Hauler
Tutorial.description: To make the villager a Wood Hauler tap the villager and pick 'Give Job,' Then tap the Logging Camp and pick 'Wood Hauler.'

Lock.message: Locked! Assign a hauler to your logging camp.

Tutorial.name: Haulers
Tutorial.description: Haulers automate your town and make it run more efficiently. Haulers collect and move resources to the stockpile, they do not create them.

Tutorial.name: Build a Market
Tutorial.description: To grow rapidly, we need a market! Markets let you buy and sell resources for gold. Tap the hammer to build a Market.

Allow.message: Locked! You have gathered enough Wood. Collect it and build a Market.
Locked! Wait for your Market to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Sell 100 Wood
Tutorial.description: Now that you've built a Market, let's sell some wood! Hurry 100 wood, collect it, then tap the Market to sell it.

Lock.message: Locked! Collect some wood to sell.

Allow.message: Locked! You have gathered enough Wood. Collect it and sell it at the Market.

Tutorial.name: Decorating!
Tutorial.description: Great work! The profit from that wood sale can improve the look of your town. Let's add some decorations!

Tutorial.name: Plant 3 Poplars!
Tutorial.description: Let's plant some trees around around the village. Villagers love trees! Tap the hammer and build three Poplar Trees now.

Allow.message: Locked! Wait for your trees to grow.

Tutorial.name: Looking Good!
Tutorial.description: Decorate your town to keep your villagers happy and productive. Your friends might also stop by, so be sure to impress them!

Tutorial.name: Expand the Land!
Tutorial.description: Your town is filling up, so let's buy more land! Tap the hammer icon, select expansions, then select 'Land Expansion 1.'

Allow.message: Locked! You have enough Wheat. Collect it and sell it for the gold you need.

Tutorial.name: Baker's Shop
Tutorial.description: Your village expanded! Now your villagers want a Bakery to make delicious treats that earn gold and XP. Build then Hurry a Baker's Shop now!

Allow.message: Locked! You have enough Wood now for your Bakery.
Locked! Wait for your Bakery to finish building.

Tutorial.name: Shops
Tutorial.description: Earn more gold by making things in shops instead of selling things at the market. It will take longer, but you can use Magic Beans to Hurry!

Tutorial.name: Get Baking!
Tutorial.description: To bake goods, tap the Baker's Shop, then choose a delicious item to bake! When it's finished, tap the Baker's Shop again to collect your profit.

Tutorial.name: Community
Tutorial.description: Keep an eye on the market. Prices change as you and other players use it. Remember to stop by your friend's towns to see how they are doing!

Tutorial.name: Visit Friends
Tutorial.description: When visiting a friend's town, watch for buildings with a $ over them. You can trade at these buildings.

Tutorial.name: Make a Trade
Tutorial.description: Try making a trade now. Press the glowing friends button below and go make a trade with a friend.
Tutorial.secondDescription: Good order! Now tap the Cottage button to go back home.

Tutorial.name: Trade Arrived!
Tutorial.description: The trade goods have arrived sooner than expected! When trading with friends, you will have to wait for them to accept and the job to finish.

Tutorial.name: GREAT JOB!
Tutorial.description: You've got everything you need to keep growing your town, so keep building more houses and shops gain new villagers and resources!

Tutorial.name: Quarry
Tutorial.description: Your town is progressing nicely, but new buildings will require rock. Build a Quarry to collect rock.

Tutorial.name: Build a Tower
Tutorial.description: Now that you have rocks, build a Tower to delight the town! Building it will be a large task, but I know you can do it!

Tutorial.name: Need Supplies
Tutorial.description: Lumber Yards turn Wood into Lumber. Tap the Lumber Yard and select 'Supply' to move Wood from the Stockpile and assign a hauler to get started.
